add.title: Create
add.subtitle: Turn what you are learning into summaries and question cards in seconds.

youtubeCard.title: Turn a YouTube video into a quiz
youtubeCard.description: Paste the link. Let Recallly turn the video into a learnable summary, key concepts, and quiz cards.
youtubeCard.submitButton: Turn video into a learning set

otherSources.title: Other sources
otherSources.textModeComingSoonMessage: Text mode works in the previous flow. We are building the main experience around YouTube.
otherSources.pdfComingSoonMessage: PDF support will be added later.

alerts.invalidYoutubeUrl: Please enter a valid YouTube link.

errors.videoProcessingFailed: Something went wrong while processing the video.

textCard.title: Paste Text
textCard.description: Turn your notes, article, or any study text into recall cards.
textCard.placeholder: Paste your notes, article, or anything here…
textCard.emptyMessage: Please paste some text to generate cards.
textCard.tooShortMessage: Add a bit more text for better cards.
textCard.processingFailed: An error occurred while processing the text.

theme.title: Theme
theme.description: Choose how Recallly looks on your device.

language.title: Language
language.description: Select the language used across the app.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Daily reminders will be added soon.

premium.title: Premium
premium.description: Create more study sets and unlock your full learning flow.
premium.premiumDescription: Your Premium plan is active. Enjoy unlimited study sets and AI generations.

review.title: Today’s Review
review.hasDueDescription: You have cards to review today. Doing them now lowers the risk of forgetting.
review.noDueDescription: No reviews due today. Add new content and test yourself.

progress.title: Learning Progress
progress.description: You reviewed {{reviewProgress}}% of your cards. Mastery is at {{masteryProgress}}%.

continue.title: Continue learning
continue.emptyDescription: Paste notes, text, or a YouTube link and turn it into review cards.

weakSpot.title: Weak Spot
weakSpot.subtitle: You may forget these cards within 2 days
weakSpot.description: This is a mock preview for now. Next, we will detect your real weak areas from the cards you miss.

empty.title: No sets yet
empty.description: Add your first piece of content. Recallly will turn it into question cards in seconds.

hero.streak: You’ve protected your memory for {{count}} days

description.hasDue: Cards are waiting for you. Review them now before they fade.
description.noDue: No reviews due today. Add new content and keep building your memory.

dueReminder.title: {{count}} cards at risk of being forgotten
dueReminder.description: Reviewing these cards now will help make the knowledge stick.

learning.title: Learning Intelligence
learning.description: Your review progress is {{reviewProgress}}%, your long-term learning level is {{masteryProgress}}%.

empty.description: Add a YouTube link and let Recallly turn it into summaries and question cards in seconds.
empty.button: Turn your first video into a quiz

header.title: Library
header.description: This is not just an archive. As you use Recallly, your learning state evolves here.
